title: How a Metal Box Changed the World - Sarah Paine
summary: This is a historical discussion on how the metal shipping container transformed global trade and logistics. The item is a podcast or video interview hosted by Dwarkesh Patel featuring historian Sarah Paine discussing the economic and geopolitical impacts of containerization technology.
